title: Verily
subtitle: My first full-time job  in the U.S. spanning from 2023 to 2025
summary: I got my return offer to the same team after the summer internship, so in Jan, 2023, I joined Verily as a full-time Software Engineer, working on the same retinal camera project.

blocks.text: The job searching in 2022 was brutal and I did not get any other offer except for this return offer from Verily, so I did not have any choice. Besides, it was a fine place to work on and I really like my teammates back then.
Our team was handling the entire software stack of a hardware project, spanning from the embedded software all the way to frontend, and I touched a little bit with a focus on frontend.

When I returned as a full-time, the project had just launched and the sales had just begun. But it did not take a salesman to tell if a project is successfully or not in the market, and I could tell it was not since the end of 2023.
The company was also at a crisis back then and we had to waste two years to do the technical separation, only to be canceled and laid off in 2025.
